creator: Anna Heim
title: (No AI) Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
dc:creator: Anna Heim
content: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.
contentSnippet: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

creator: Kate Park
title: (No AI) AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
dc:creator: Kate Park
content: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.
contentSnippet: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

title: (No AI) Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos
author: Emma Roth
content:
![An AI-generated image from Muse AI](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/meta-muse-image-instagram-tag.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Meta is launching the first AI image generation model made by its Superintelligence Labs division. The [Muse Image model](https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-image-muse-video-msl/) now powers the image-making tools across the Meta AI app, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and it's coming soon to Facebook and Messenger, [according to an announcement on Tuesday](https://about.fb.com/news/2026/07/introducing-muse-image-meta-ai/).

It's part of the growing Muse family of AI models that replace Meta's Llama lineup. Alexandr Wang, who Meta hired to [head up its Superintelligence Labs](https://www.theverge.com/news/695355/mark-zuckerberg-meta-ai-superintelligence-labs) last year, [says on Threads that Muse Image is](https://www.threads.com/@alexanddeer/post/DagKCLtkfHn) "agentic," meaning it works with its [Muse Spark large language model](https://www.theverge.com/tech/908769/meta-muse-spark-ai-model-launch-rollout) "to reason through your prompt, search the web, and plan before it generates." Meta is al …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/962485/meta-muse-image-ai-model-instagram)
contentSnippet:
Meta is launching the first AI image generation model made by its Superintelligence Labs division. The Muse Image model now powers the image-making tools across the Meta AI app, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and it's coming soon to Facebook and Messenger, according to an announcement on Tuesday.
It's part of the growing Muse family of AI models that replace Meta's Llama lineup. Alexandr Wang, who Meta hired to head up its Superintelligence Labs last year, says on Threads that Muse Image is "agentic," meaning it works with its Muse Spark large language model "to reason through your prompt, search the web, and plan before it generates." Meta is al …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
author: Stevie Bonifield
content:
![A phone and laptop side by side running Claude Cowork](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/Cowork-Web-Mobile-Press-No-Logo-1920x1080-1.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Starting Tuesday, Anthropic's [Claude Cowork AI platform](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/860730/anthropic-cowork-feature-ai-agents-claude-code) will be [available on mobile and web](https://claude.com/blog/cowork-web-mobile/) for the first time. The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscribers and coming to Claude users on other plans "in the coming weeks."

Claude Cowork was previously only accessible through the Claude desktop app for macOS and Windows, but now users on iOS and Android can also use it. However, Anthropic says the "full experience" for Cowork will still be on the desktop app, including features like local file access.

Cowork sessions will also now run in the cloud by default, so you can continue them across different devices or run Cowork ta …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/961978/anthropic-claude-cowork-mobile-web)

creator: Joel Khalili
title: (No AI) This Former DeepMind Exec Thinks the AI Arms Race Could End in Disaster
dc:creator: Joel Khalili
content: Verity Harding tells WIRED that the US government’s nationalistic attitude toward AI is evidence that a worst-case scenario is taking shape.
contentSnippet: Verity Harding tells WIRED that the US government’s nationalistic attitude toward AI is evidence that a worst-case scenario is taking shape.

creator: Reece Rogers
title: (No AI) Meta Now Lets Anyone Use Your Instagram Photos in AI Images—Unless You Opt Out
dc:creator: Reece Rogers
content: As part of Meta’s Muse Image model rollout, Instagram users with public accounts need to opt out to block AI generations of their content.
contentSnippet: As part of Meta’s Muse Image model rollout, Instagram users with public accounts need to opt out to block AI generations of their content.
